file.content:
import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'

import { store } from './app-state'
import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'

export default function App() {
  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme

  return (
    <Router>
      <StoreProvider store={store}>
        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
          <GlobalStyle />
          <AppRoutes />
        </ThemeProvider>
      </StoreProvider>
    </Router>
  )
}

    "build": "tsc && vite build",

    "lint": "eslint --fix .",

    "prepare": "husky",
    "prettier": "prettier --write .",
    "serve": "vite preview",
    "start": "vite",
    "check": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest",
    "test:ci": "vitest run",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",

1→import { StrictMode } from 'react'
     2→import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
     3→
     4→import App from './App'
     5→import * as serviceWorker from './serviceWorker'
     6→
     7→const container = document.querySelector('#root') as HTMLElement
     8→const root = createRoot(container)
     9→
    10→root.render(
    11→  <StrictMode>
    12→    <App />
    13→  </StrictMode>
    14→)
    15→
    16→// If you want your app to work offline and load faster, you can change
    17→// unregister() to register() below. Note this comes with some pitfalls.
    18→// Learn more about service workers: https://bit.ly/CRA-PWA
    19→serviceWorker.unregister()
    20→

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}
   101→

     4→import { reducer as order } from './order'

     6→export const rootReducer = combineReducers({
     7→  cart,
     8→  order,
     9→})
    10→
    11→export const store = configureStore({
    12→  reducer: rootReducer,
    13→})
    14→
    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch
    16→export type RootState = ReturnType<typeof store.getState>
    17→

file.content:
import { DefaultTheme } from 'styled-components'

declare module 'styled-components' {
  export interface DefaultTheme {
    name: 'light' | 'dark'
    fonts: {
      family: string
    }
    spacing: typeof spacing
    color: typeof color
    borderRadius: typeof borderRadius
    boxShadow: typeof boxShadow
    typography: typeof typography
  }
}

const baseColors = {
  white: '#FFFFFF ',
  black: '#202020',
  red: {
    base: '#D70808',
    light1: '#E57373',
    light2: '#EF9A9A',
    dark1: '#C62828',
    dark2: '#B71C1C',
  },
  otherBlack: '#2C2C2C ',
  grey: {
    base: '#909090',
    light1: '#A6A6A6',
    light2: '#BCBCBC',
    light3: '#D2D2D2',
    light4: '#E9E9E9',
    light5: '#F5F6F7',
    light6: '#F9F9F9',
    dark1: '#797979',
    dark2: '#636363',
    dark3: '#4D4D4D',
    dark4: '#363636',
    dark5: '#2C2C2C',
    dark6: '#202020',
  },
  green: {
    base: '#E5F8BC',
    light1: '#E8F9C3',
    light2: '#EAF9C9',
    light3: '#EDFAD0',
    light4: '#EFFBD7',
    light5: '#F2FCDE',
    dark1: '#CEDFA9',
    dark2: '#B7C696',
    dark3: '#A0AE84',
    dark4: '#899571',
    dark5: '#737C5E',
  },
  blue: {
    base: '#B1DDE4',
    light1: '#B9E0E7',
    light2: '#C1E4E9',
    light3: '#C8E7EC',
    light4: '#D0EBEF',
    light5: '#D8EEF2',
    dark1: '#9FC7CD',
    dark2: '#8EB1B6',
    dark3: '#7C9BA0',
    dark4: '#6A8589',
    dark5: '#596f72',
  },
}

const spaceUnit = 1

const borderRadius = {
  xs: '4px',
  s: '8px',
  m: '16px',
  l: '24px',
  xl: '32px',
  xxl: '40px',
  round: '50%',
}

const spacing = {
  xxs: `${0.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xs: `${0.5 * spaceUnit}em`,
  s: `${spaceUnit}em`,
  m: `${1.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  l: `${2 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xl: `${3.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xxl: `${5.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
}

const boxShadow = {
  card: '0px 14px 26px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
  inner: 'inset 0 3px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
  outerBorder: `0 0 0 1px ${baseColors.blue.dark2}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.light5}`,
}

const typography = {
  fontSize: {
    body: '1.125rem',
    bodyS: '1rem',
    bodyXS: '0.9rem',
    bodyXXS: '0.72rem',
    heading1: '2.74rem',
    heading2: '2.19rem',
    heading3: '1.75rem',
    heading4: '1.4rem',
  },
  fontWeight: {
    black: '900',
    bold: '700',
    medium: '500',
    regular: '400',
  },
}

const color = {
  accentText: baseColors.black,
  badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.light4,
  badgeText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.base,
  bannerBackground: baseColors.blue.base,
  buttonClear: 'transparent',
  buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.light5,
  buttonPrimary: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.grey.dark5, // recheck
  buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
  buttonSecondaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
  buttonText: baseColors.white,
  cardBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  error: baseColors.red.dark2,
  formBackground: baseColors.white,
  foodItemBackground: baseColors.white,
  footerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  headerBackground: baseColors.white,
  restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.white,
  headerBorder: baseColors.grey.light4,
  inputBackground: baseColors.grey.light5,
  inputHint: baseColors.grey.dark1,
  inputIcon: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  label: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  labelActive: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.light5,
  orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.light5,
  primaryText: baseColors.otherBlack,
  secondaryText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  // This is just used to demo a11y violations, use it in the Review component
  bannerText: baseColors.blue.dark3,
  reviewText: baseColors.blue.dark5,
  screenBackground: baseColors.white,
  sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  sidebarFooter: baseColors.white,
  skeletonBase: baseColors.grey.light4,
  skeletonHighlight: baseColors.grey.light5,
  topBannerBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  newRestaurantTag: baseColors.green.base,
  white: baseColors.white,
  black: baseColors.black,
}

export const lightTheme: DefaultTheme = {
  borderRadius,
  boxShadow,
  color,
  fonts: {
    family: 'NunitoSans, sans-serif',
  },
  name: 'light',
  spacing,
  typography,
}

export const darkTheme: DefaultTheme = {
  ...lightTheme,
  boxShadow: {
    ...boxShadow,
    outerBorder: `0 0 0 2px ${baseColors.blue.dark5}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.base}`,
  },
  color: {
    ...lightTheme.color,
    badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    badgeText: baseColors.grey.light1,
    cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
    bannerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.dark4, // recheck
    buttonPrimary: baseColors.green.base,
    buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
    buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
    buttonText: baseColors.otherBlack,
    cardBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.dark1,
    formBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    foodItemBackground: baseColors.otherBlack,
    headerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    headerBorder: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    inputBackground: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    inputIcon: baseColors.white,
    inputHint: baseColors.grey.light1,
    label: baseColors.grey.light4,
    labelActive: baseColors.white,
    menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.green.base,
    stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    overlayBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    primaryText: baseColors.white,
    reviewText: baseColors.blue.base,
    screenBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    sidebarFooter: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    skeletonBase: baseColors.grey.dark3,
    skeletonHighlight: baseColors.grey.dark2,
    topBannerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  },
  name: 'dark',
}

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→import { Header, HeaderComponent } from '../components/Header/Header'
     5→import { Footer } from '../components/Footer/Footer'
     6→
     7→const Container = styled.div`
     8→  min-height: calc(100vh - 200px);
     9→`
    10→
    11→type PageTemplateProperties = {
    12→  type?: 'default' | 'sticky-header' | 'basic'
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const PageTemplate: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<PageTemplateProperties>> = ({
    16→  type = 'default',
    17→  children,
    18→}) => {
    19→  switch (type) {
    20→    case 'sticky-header': {
    21→      return (
    22→        <>
    23→          <Header sticky />
    24→          <Container>{children}</Container>
    25→          <Footer />
    26→        </>
    27→      )
    28→    }
    29→    case 'basic': {
    30→      return (
    31→        <>
    32→          <HeaderComponent logoOnly />
    33→          <Container>{children}</Container>
    34→        </>
    35→      )
    36→    }
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  return (
    40→    <>
    41→      <Header />
    42→      <Container>{children}</Container>
    43→      <Footer />
    44→    </>
    45→  )
    46→}
    47→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import { CSSTransition } from 'react-transition-group'
     3→
     4→import { Portal } from '../Portal'
     5→import { useKey } from '../../hooks/useKeyboard'
     6→import { Button } from '../Button'
     7→import { useLockBodyScroll } from '../../hooks/useBodyScrollLock'
     8→
     9→import { ModalContent, TopBar, Backdrop } from './Modal.styles'
    10→
    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→

     5→import { Button } from '../Button'
     6→import { Heading } from '../typography'
     7→
     8→import { SidebarContainer, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, TopBar, Backdrop } from './Sidebar.styles'
     9→
    10→type SidebarProps = {
    11→  isOpen: boolean
    12→  title: string
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→  footer?: React.ReactNode
    15→}
    16→
    17→export const Sidebar: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<SidebarProps>> = ({
    18→  children,
    19→  footer,
    20→  isOpen,
    21→  title,
    22→  onClose,
    23→}) => {
    24→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    25→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    26→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    27→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)

    30→    <>
    31→      <CSSTransition
    32→        in={isOpen}

    36→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    37→      >
    38→        <SidebarContainer data-testid="sidebar" ref={contentRef}>

    40→            <Heading level={4}>{title}</Heading>

    47→              icon="cross"

    50→          </TopBar>
    51→          <SidebarContent data-testid="sidebar-content">{children}</SidebarContent>
    52→          {footer && <SidebarFooter data-testid="sidebar-footer">{footer}</SidebarFooter>}

    55→
    56→      <CSSTransition
    57→        in={isOpen}
    58→        timeout={300}
    59→        classNames="backdrop"
    60→        unmountOnExit
    61→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    62→      >

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'
     5→import { Body } from '../../typography/Body'
     6→import { toCurrency } from '../../../helpers'
     7→
     8→import {
     9→  OrderSummaryContainer,
    10→  BottomContainer,
    11→  CartItemsContainer,
    12→  StyledHeading,
    13→} from './OrderSummary.styles'
    14→
    15→type OrderSummaryProps = {
    16→  cartItems: CartItem[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {
    20→  const totalPrice = useMemo(
    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <>
    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>
    27→        <StyledHeading level={3} $withMargin>
    28→          Your order
    29→        </StyledHeading>
    30→        <CartItemsContainer>
    31→          {cartItems.length > 0 ? (
    32→            cartItems.map((item) => <ShoppingCartItem key={item.id} item={item} />)
    33→          ) : (
    34→            <Body>Your cart is empty.</Body>
    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>
    37→        <BottomContainer>
    38→          <Body>Total</Body>
    39→          <StyledHeading level={2}>{toCurrency(totalPrice)}</StyledHeading>
    40→        </BottomContainer>
    41→      </OrderSummaryContainer>
    42→    </>
    43→  )
    44→}

1→import styled from 'styled-components'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import Carousel, { type ArrowProps, type CarouselProps } from 'react-multi-carousel'
     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→

1→import { TypedUseSelectorHook, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'

1→import { createSelector } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { RootState } from '../store'
     4→
     5→const selectCart = (state: RootState) => state.cart
     6→
     7→export const selectCartVisibility = createSelector([selectCart], (cart) => cart.visible)
     8→
     9→export const selectCartItems = createSelector([selectCart], (cart) => cart.items)
    10→
    11→export const selectCartItemsCount = createSelector([selectCartItems], (items) =>
    12→  items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.quantity, 0)
    13→)
    14→
    15→export const selectCartTotal = createSelector([selectCartItems], (items) =>
    16→  items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.quantity * item.price, 0)
    17→)

1→import { createSlice, CaseReducer, PayloadAction } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { CartItem } from '../cart'
     4→
     5→export type OrderState = {
     6→  items: CartItem[]
     7→}
     8→
     9→const saveOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState, PayloadAction<CartItem[]>> = (state, action) => {
    10→  state.items = action.payload
    11→}
    12→
    13→const clearOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState> = (state) => {
    14→  state.items = []
    15→}
    16→
    17→const initialState: OrderState = {
    18→  items: [],
    19→}
    20→
    21→const orderSlice = createSlice({
    22→  name: 'order',
    23→  initialState,
    24→  reducers: {
    25→    saveOrderAction: saveOrder,
    26→    clearOrderAction: clearOrder,
    27→  },
    28→})
    29→
    30→// Extract the action creators object and the reducer
    31→export const { actions, reducer } = orderSlice
    32→
    33→// Extract and export each action creator by name
    34→export const { saveOrderAction, clearOrderAction } = actions
    35→
    36→// Export the reducer, either as a default or named export
    37→export default reducer

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled, { css } from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→type FontSize = 'body' | 'bodyS' | 'bodyXS' | 'bodyXXS'
     5→type FontWeight = 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
     6→
     7→type StyledBodyProps = {
     8→  $size: string
     9→  $fontWeight: string
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BodyBase = styled.p<StyledBodyProps>(
    13→  ({ $size, $fontWeight, color: textColor, theme: { typography, color } }) => css`
    14→    display: block;
    15→    font-family: 'Hind';
    16→    color: ${textColor || color.primaryText};
    17→    font-weight: ${typography.fontWeight[$fontWeight as FontWeight]};
    18→    font-size: ${typography.fontSize[`body${$size}` as FontSize]};
    19→  `
    20→)
    21→
    22→type AsElement = 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    23→
    24→type ElementProps<T extends AsElement> = T extends 'label'
    25→  ? React.LabelHTMLAttributes<HTMLLabelElement>
    26→  : T extends 'span'
    27→    ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>
    28→    : T extends 'p'
    29→      ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
    30→      : React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
    31→
    32→type DefaultProps = {
    33→  className?: string
    34→  size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    35→  fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    36→  type?: AsElement
    37→  color?: string
    38→  children: React.ReactNode | string
    39→}
    40→
    41→type BodyProps = DefaultProps & ElementProps<AsElement>
    42→
    43→export const Body: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<BodyProps>> = ({
    44→  size = '',
    45→  fontWeight = 'regular',
    46→  type = 'p',
    47→  color,
    48→  children,
    49→  className,
    50→  ...props
    51→}) => (
    52→  <BodyBase
    53→    as={type}
    54→    $size={size}
    55→    $fontWeight={fontWeight}
    56→    color={color}
    57→    className={className}
    58→    {...props}
    59→  >
    60→    {children}
    61→  </BodyBase>
    62→)
    63→

1→import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
     2→import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
     3→import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'
     5→
     6→import { store } from './app-state'
     7→import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
     8→import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
     9→import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'
    10→
    11→export default function App() {
    12→  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
    13→  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <Router>
    17→      <StoreProvider store={store}>
    18→        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
    19→          <GlobalStyle />
    20→          <AppRoutes />
    21→        </ThemeProvider>
    22→      </StoreProvider>
    23→    </Router>
    24→  )
    25→}

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}

## Complete Codebase Exploration Report

I've thoroughly explored the entire codebase at `/Users/yannbraga/open-source/storybook-eval/trials/2026-05-05T16-32-28Z-ff7ab459/project/src/`. Here's the comprehensive overview:

---

## 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS (`src/types/index.ts`)
- **ShopItem**: Base type with id, name, price, imageUrl, description
- **FoodMenuItem**: Contains id, name, description, price
- **Restaurant**: Complex type with name, id, rating, specialty, photoUrl, categories, menu (food/dessert/drinks), and status flags (isClosed, isNew, isLoading)

---

## 2. COMPONENTS IN `src/components/`

### Core Layout Components
- **Header**: Connected component managing cart visibility toggle, navigation, dark mode toggle. Uses Redux for cart state.
- **Footer**: Multi-column footer with logo, navigation links, social media, and app store banners
- **Sidebar**: Animated panel with close button, title, content area, footer slot. Uses Escape key handler and body scroll lock
- **Modal**: Portal-based modal with backdrop, animations, Escape key close, body scroll lock
- **Portal**: Wrapper using React Portal to render into DOM selector element

### Navigation & Structure
- **PageSection**: Container with title, optional top button
- **TopBanner**: Customizable banner with optional background image and title
- **Breadcrumb**: Navigation breadcrumb with path links

### UI Components
- **Button**: Styled button with clear/large/round/icon variants, icon support
- **Badge**: Small inline badge with text styling
- **Icon**: SVG icon renderer using sprite map
- **IconButton**: Circular button with icon (for carousel arrows)
- **Heading**: H1-H5 headings with theme-aware styling
- **Body**: Paragraph/span text with font weight and size variants
- **Review**: Star rating display with quality assessment text

### Shopping Cart Components
- **ShoppingCartMenu**: Sidebar-based cart with items and checkout button (footer)
- **ShoppingCartItem**: Individual cart item display with quantity and price
- **OrderSummary**: Cart items list with total calculation
- **Select**: Dropdown with arrow icon (used for quantity selection)
- **Input**: Form input with label and error message

### Business Components
- **RestaurantCard**: Card display for restaurants with image, name, rating, specialty, badges, "new" tag, "closed" overlay
- **RestaurantCardSkeleton**: Loading skeleton for restaurant cards
- **Category**: Flexible category display (round or square) with hover effects
- **AnimatedIllustration**: Lottie animation loader for NotFound/Error animations
- **ErrorBlock**: Error display with title, image, body text, action button
- **Spinner**: Custom animated spinner SVG with text
- **Logo**: SVG logo with animated parts, light/dark theme variants
- **FooterCard**: Footer section with heading and link lists

---

## 3. PAGES IN `src/pages/`

### HomePage
- Main landing page with:
  - **Banner**: Hero section with call-to-action
  - **RestaurantsSection**: Carousel of featured restaurants (3 items per slide)
  - **AwardWinningSection**: Promotional section with sliding background
  - **CategoriesSection**: Category carousel (6 items on desktop)
  - Uses `useFetchRestaurants()` hook for data

### CategoryListPage
- Displays all food categories in grid
- Top banner with description
- Uses `categories` stub data

### CategoryDetailPage
- Shows restaurants filtered by category
- Uses `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory()` hook
- Breadcrumb navigation
- Error state for empty categories
- Grid layout with restaurant cards

### RestaurantDetailPage
- Full restaurant details including:
  - Photo banner
  - Name, specialty, rating, category badges
  - Menu sections: Food, Dessert, Drinks
  - FoodItemModal for item selection
  - Modal integration with cart state
  - Error handling (404, 500)
  - Loading spinner

### CheckoutPage
- Multi-step form component (registration-form)
- OrderSummary sidebar
- Styled layout with top/bottom containers

### SuccessPage
- Order confirmation display
- Shows estimated delivery time
- OrderSummary of purchased items
- Celebratory illustration

---

## 4. STATE MANAGEMENT (`src/app-state/`)

### Store Setup (`store.ts`)
- Redux toolkit with combined reducers
- Exports AppDispatch and RootState types

### Hooks (`hooks.ts`)
- `useAppDispatch()`: Typed dispatch hook
- `useAppSelector()`: Typed selector hook

### Cart Reducer (`cart/cart.ts`)
- **CartItem**: ShopItem + quantity
- **CartState**: visible (boolean), items (CartItem[])
- **Actions**:
  - `toggleVisibilityAction`: Toggle cart visibility
  - `saveItemAction`: Add/update item (updates quantity if exists)
  - `removeItemAction`: Decrement quantity or remove
  - `clearItemAction`: Remove item completely
  - `clearCartAction`: Clear all and hide

### Cart Selectors (`cart/selectors.ts`)
- `selectCartVisibility`: Cart panel visibility
- `selectCartItems`: All items in cart
- `selectCartItemsCount`: Total quantity
- `selectCartTotal`: Total price calculation

### Order Reducer (`order/order.ts`)
- **OrderState**: items (CartItem[])
- **Actions**:
  - `saveOrderAction`: Store order items
  - `clearOrderAction`: Clear order

---

## 5. API & DATA (`src/api/`, `src/stub/`)

### API Layer (`api/index.ts` & `api/conditional-logic.ts`)
- **RestaurantsApi**: Real API calls to netlify function
- **MockedRestaurantsApi**: Mock data for Storybook/test environments
- Conditional logic: Uses `isMockedEnvironment` flag
- API caching (disabled in mock mode)
- Methods: `getRestaurants()`, `getRestaurantById()`, `getRestaurantsByCategory()`

### API Hooks (`api/hooks.ts`)
- `useFetchRestaurants()`: Fetches all restaurants
- `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory()`: Filters by category
- `useFetchRestaurant()`: Single restaurant fetch
- All support retry logic and status tracking (idle/loading/success/error codes)

### Stub Data
- **categories**: 6 food categories with Pexels images
- **restaurants**: 10 complete restaurant objects with menus
- **cartItems**: 6 sample items for testing

---

## 6. HOOKS (`src/hooks/`)

- **useLockBodyScroll**: Prevents scrolling when modal/sidebar open
- **useKey**: Keyboard event listener (used for Escape key in Modal/Sidebar)

---

## 7. STORIES (`src/stories/`)

Storybook example stories:
- **Button.stories.ts**: Primary/Secondary/Large/Small variants
- **Header.stories.ts**: LoggedIn/LoggedOut states
- **Page.stories.ts**: Example page story (template-based)

---

## 8. ROUTES & TEMPLATES (`src/Routes.tsx`, `src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx`)

### Routes
- `/` → HomePage
- `/categories` → CategoryListPage
- `/categories/:id` → CategoryDetailPage
- `/restaurants/:id` → RestaurantDetailPage
- `/checkout` → CheckoutPage
- `/success` → SuccessPage
- Modal portal div rendered at root

### PageTemplate
Three layout types:
- **default**: Header + Content + Footer
- **sticky-header**: Sticky Header + Content + Footer
- **basic**: Logo-only Header + Content (no Footer)

---

## 9. KEY FEATURES & PATTERNS

### Modal Implementation
- Uses Portal component with DOM selector "#modal"
- CSSTransition animations (300ms)
- Backdrop click to close
- Escape key support
- Body scroll lock integration

### Shopping Cart System
- Redux-based state management
- Sidebar menu for cart view
- Quantity selection via dropdown
- Checkout navigation
- Cart item modification in detail pages

### Styling
- Styled-components with theme support
- Dark/light mode toggle (use-dark-mode)
- Responsive breakpoints (S, M, L)
- Theme properties: colors, spacing, borderRadius, typography, boxShadow
- Global styles and CSS reset

### Data Flow
- React Router for navigation
- Redux for global state
- Custom hooks for API data
- Prop drilling for component composition
- Error boundary patterns with ErrorBlock

### Special Components
- **Carousel**: react-multi-carousel for responsive sliders
- **Skeleton Loading**: react-loading-skeleton for loading states
- **Animations**: react-transition-group for modals/sidebars
- **Form Validation**: Separate validation module (registration-form)
- **Lottie**: React animations in AnimatedIllustration

---

## 10. ABSOLUTE FILE PATHS

- Order confirmation display
- Shows estimated delivery time
- OrderSummary of purchased items
- Celebratory illustration

---

## 4. STATE MANAGEMENT (`src/app-state/`)

### Store Setup (`store.ts`)
- Redux toolkit with combined reducers
- Exports AppDispatch and RootState types

### Hooks (`hooks.ts`)
- `useAppDispatch()`: Typed dispatch hook
- `useAppSelector()`: Typed selector hook

### Cart Reducer (`cart/cart.ts`)
- **CartItem**: ShopItem + quantity
- **CartState**: visible (boolean), items (CartItem[])
- **Actions**:
  - `toggleVisibilityAction`: Toggle cart visibility
  - `saveItemAction`: Add/update item (updates quantity if exists)
  - `removeItemAction`: Decrement quantity or remove
  - `clearItemAction`: Remove item completely
  - `clearCartAction`: Clear all and hide

### Cart Selectors (`cart/selectors.ts`)
- `selectCartVisibility`: Cart panel visibility
- `selectCartItems`: All items in cart
- `selectCartItemsCount`: Total quantity
- `selectCartTotal`: Total price calculation

### Order Reducer (`order/order.ts`)
- **OrderState**: items (CartItem[])
- **Actions**:
  - `saveOrderAction`: Store order items
  - `clearOrderAction`: Clear order

---

## 5. API & DATA (`src/api/`, `src/stub/`)

### API Layer (`api/index.ts` & `api/conditional-logic.ts`)
- **RestaurantsApi**: Real API calls to netlify function
- **MockedRestaurantsApi**: Mock data for Storybook/test environments
- Conditional logic: Uses `isMockedEnvironment` flag
- API caching (disabled in mock mode)
- Methods: `getRestaurants()`, `getRestaurantById()`, `getRestaurantsByCategory()`

### API Hooks (`api/hooks.ts`)
- `useFetchRestaurants()`: Fetches all restaurants
- `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory()`: Filters by category
- `useFetchRestaurant()`: Single restaurant fetch
- All support retry logic and status tracking (idle/loading/success/error codes)

### Stub Data
- **categories**: 6 food categories with Pexels images
- **restaurants**: 10 complete restaurant objects with menus
- **cartItems**: 6 sample items for testing

---

## 6. HOOKS (`src/hooks/`)

- **useLockBodyScroll**: Prevents scrolling when modal/sidebar open
- **useKey**: Keyboard event listener (used for Escape key in Modal/Sidebar)

---

## 7. STORIES (`src/stories/`)

Storybook example stories:
- **Button.stories.ts**: Primary/Secondary/Large/Small variants
- **Header.stories.ts**: LoggedIn/LoggedOut states
- **Page.stories.ts**: Example page story (template-based)

---

## 8. ROUTES & TEMPLATES (`src/Routes.tsx`, `src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx`)

### Routes
- `/` → HomePage
- `/categories` → CategoryListPage
- `/categories/:id` → CategoryDetailPage
- `/restaurants/:id` → RestaurantDetailPage
- `/checkout` → CheckoutPage
- `/success` → SuccessPage
- Modal portal div rendered at root

### PageTemplate
Three layout types:
- **default**: Header + Content + Footer
- **sticky-header**: Sticky Header + Content + Footer
- **basic**: Logo-only Header + Content (no Footer)

---

## 9. KEY FEATURES & PATTERNS

### Modal Implementation
- Uses Portal component with DOM selector "#modal"
- CSSTransition animations (300ms)
- Backdrop click to close
- Escape key support
- Body scroll lock integration

### Shopping Cart System
- Redux-based state management
- Sidebar menu for cart view
- Quantity selection via dropdown
- Checkout navigation
- Cart item modification in detail pages

### Styling
- Styled-components with theme support
- Dark/light mode toggle (use-dark-mode)
- Responsive breakpoints (S, M, L)
- Theme properties: colors, spacing, borderRadius, typography, boxShadow
- Global styles and CSS reset

### Data Flow
- React Router for navigation
- Redux for global state
- Custom hooks for API data
- Prop drilling for component composition
- Error boundary patterns with ErrorBlock

### Special Components
- **Carousel**: react-multi-carousel for responsive sliders
- **Skeleton Loading**: react-loading-skeleton for loading states
- **Animations**: react-transition-group for modals/sidebars
- **Form Validation**: Separate validation module (registration-form)
- **Lottie**: React animations in AnimatedIllustration

---

## 10. ABSOLUTE FILE PATHS

**Core App**
- `/Users/yannbraga/open-source/storybook-eval/trials/2026-05-05T16-32-28Z-ff7ab459/project/src/App.tsx`

import styled from 'styled-components'

import { PageTemplate } from '../../templates/PageTemplate'
import { categories } from '../../stub/categories'

import { RestaurantsSection } from './components/RestaurantsSection'
import { CategoriesSection } from './components/CategoriesSection/CategoriesSection'
import { Banner } from './components/Banner'
import { AwardWinningSection } from './components/AwardWinningSection'

const Spacing = styled.div`
  margin-bottom: 4.5rem;
`

export const HomePage = () => (
  <PageTemplate>
    <Banner />
    <Spacing />
    <RestaurantsSection title="Our favorite picks" />
    <Spacing />
    <AwardWinningSection />
    <Spacing />
    <CategoriesSection categories={categories} />
    <Spacing />
  </PageTemplate>
)

import styled, { useTheme } from 'styled-components'

const StyledSVG = styled.svg`
  width: 100px;
  height: 100px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
`

export const Spinner = () => {
  const { color } = useTheme()
  return (
    <StyledSVG
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      viewBox="0 0 100 100"
      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid"
    >
      <text transform="translate(-50 0)" fill={color.primaryText}>
        Looking for some food...
      </text>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" dur="1s" keyTimes="0;0.4;1" values="0;0;1" />
      <g>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
        </circle>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-15 0)">
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de" transform="rotate(90 50 50)" />
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 1 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;-45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
      </g>
    </StyledSVG>
  )
}

content.thinking:
Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me also check the CheckoutPage and the ErrorBlock component.

Key findings:
1. **Providers needed**: `BrowserRouter`, Redux `Provider` (with store), `ThemeProvider` (styled-components), `GlobalStyle`
2. **Dark mode**: `use-dark-mode` reads from localStorage key `darkMode` 
3. **Portal**: `#modal` div is created in Routes.tsx - need in preview-body.html
4. **API**: The app already has `MockedRestaurantsApi` that returns stub data when `import.meta.env.STORYBOOK` is set. 

I need to clarify the API setup though—there are two files handling this. The main `api/index.ts` always uses the real `RestaurantsApi` with axios, while `api/conditional-logic.ts` has the logic to switch to `MockedRestaurantsApi` in Storybook mode. I should check which one the app actually imports to understand if mocking is already handled.

5. **CSS**: All via styled-components, no index.css to import
6. **Pages**: HomePage, CategoryListPage, CategoryDetailPage, RestaurantDetailPage, CheckoutPage, SuccessPage test

But looking at the imports in `api/hooks.ts`, it imports from `./index`, not `./conditional-logic`. So the hooks use the REAL API, which makes real axios requests.

Wait, let me re-read:
- `api/index.ts` line 13-16 says `const isMockedEnvironment = !!import.meta.env.STORYBOOK || import.meta.env.NODE_ENV === 'test' || (globalThis as any).__vitest_browser__`
- And the hooks import `api` from `./index`
- But then `api/conditional-logic.ts` has a different version

Looking again at `api/index.ts` - it only has `RestaurantsApi` and uses axios directly. The `isMockedEnvironment` flag is only used for caching (skip cache in mocked env).

The `api/conditional-logic.ts` has `MockedRestaurantsApi` and conditionally exports the api based on environment. But hooks.ts imports from `./index`, not from `./conditional-logic`.

So the hooks will make real HTTP requests to `https://mealdrop.netlify.app/.netlify/functions/restaurants` via axios, even in Storybook! This means I DO need MSW to handle these API calls. The `isMockedEnvironment` flag only affects caching behavior, not whether real requests are made. And it looks like `conditional-logic.ts` was meant to handle this but the hooks aren't actually using it.

So I need MSW handlers for the three restaurant endpoints - getting all restaurants, getting by ID, and getting by category - all returning stub data from `restaurantsCompleteData`. Let me check if MSW is already configured in the public directory.

content.thinking:
Wait, the RestaurantDetailPage uses `useParams` to get the id. Since we're rendering it directly with a Router in the preview, the component will get an empty id. I need to handle this differently. Let me think...

The page uses `useParams<'id'>()` to extract the id. In the preview, we already have a `BrowserRouter`. The issue is that there's no route matching `/restaurants/:id`. 

Looking at the `useFetchRestaurant` hook - it takes an id parameter and calls `api.getRestaurantById(id)`. In the MSW handler, I handle the `?id=` query param.
 
The real issue is that `useParams` won't work without a matching route. I could use `MemoryRouter` with `initialEntries` in a decorator to set up the right URL path, which would override the preview's `BrowserRouter` and let `useParams` actually extract the id parameter. I'm realizing the decorator approach with a catch-all route won't extract the `:id` parameter that `useParams` needs, so I need to either use `MemoryRouter` to bypass the preview's Router entirely, or set up the route pattern correctly to capture the ID from the URL. I need to actually use the Router's navigate function to trigger a re-render when the URL changes, since just calling pushState won't work. I'll set up a Routes/Route structure in the decorator that redirects to `/restaurants/1`, which will match the parameterized route and give `useParams` the correct id value—I'll apply the same pattern to CategoryDetailPage as well.

Looking at the CategoryListPage:
```
<StyledHeading level={2}>What's on the menu?</StyledHeading>
```

The error message shows a standard apostrophe, so maybe I need to try a regex pattern to match the text more flexibly instead of looking for an exact string match.

| `CheckoutPage/CheckoutPage.stories.tsx` | 1 | Checkout page with Redux |

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}
   101→

    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→import { Header, HeaderComponent } from '../components/Header/Header'
     5→import { Footer } from '../components/Footer/Footer'
     6→
     7→const Container = styled.div`
     8→  min-height: calc(100vh - 200px);
     9→`
    10→
    11→type PageTemplateProperties = {
    12→  type?: 'default' | 'sticky-header' | 'basic'
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const PageTemplate: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<PageTemplateProperties>> = ({
    16→  type = 'default',
    17→  children,
    18→}) => {
    19→  switch (type) {
    20→    case 'sticky-header': {
    21→      return (
    22→        <>
    23→          <Header sticky />
    24→          <Container>{children}</Container>
    25→          <Footer />
    26→        </>
    27→      )
    28→    }
    29→    case 'basic': {
    30→      return (
    31→        <>
    32→          <HeaderComponent logoOnly />
    33→          <Container>{children}</Container>
    34→        </>
    35→      )
    36→    }
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  return (
    40→    <>
    41→      <Header />
    42→      <Container>{children}</Container>
    43→      <Footer />
    44→    </>
    45→  )
    46→}

     2→export * from './useKeyboard'

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import { CSSTransition } from 'react-transition-group'
     3→
     4→import { Portal } from '../Portal'
     5→import { useKey } from '../../hooks/useKeyboard'
     6→import { Button } from '../Button'
     7→import { useLockBodyScroll } from '../../hooks/useBodyScrollLock'
     8→
     9→import { ModalContent, TopBar, Backdrop } from './Modal.styles'
    10→
    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→

     5→import { Button } from '../Button'

     9→
    10→type SidebarProps = {
    11→  isOpen: boolean
    12→  title: string
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→  footer?: React.ReactNode
    15→}
    16→
    17→export const Sidebar: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<SidebarProps>> = ({
    18→  children,
    19→  footer,
    20→  isOpen,
    21→  title,
    22→  onClose,
    23→}) => {
    24→  useKey('escape', onClose)

    36→        nodeRef={contentRef}

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'
     5→import { Body } from '../../typography/Body'
     6→import { toCurrency } from '../../../helpers'
     7→
     8→import {
     9→  OrderSummaryContainer,
    10→  BottomContainer,
    11→  CartItemsContainer,
    12→  StyledHeading,
    13→} from './OrderSummary.styles'
    14→
    15→type OrderSummaryProps = {
    16→  cartItems: CartItem[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {
    20→  const totalPrice = useMemo(
    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <>
    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>
    27→        <StyledHeading level={3} $withMargin>
    28→          Your order
    29→        </StyledHeading>
    30→        <CartItemsContainer>
    31→          {cartItems.length > 0 ? (
    32→            cartItems.map((item) => <ShoppingCartItem key={item.id} item={item} />)
    33→          ) : (
    34→            <Body>Your cart is empty.</Body>
    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>
    37→        <BottomContainer>
    38→          <Body>Total</Body>
    39→          <StyledHeading level={2}>{toCurrency(totalPrice)}</StyledHeading>
    40→        </BottomContainer>
    41→      </OrderSummaryContainer>
    42→    </>
    43→  )
    44→}

    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}

1→import { TypedUseSelectorHook, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'

1→import { createSelector } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { RootState } from '../store'
     4→
     5→const selectCart = (state: RootState) => state.cart
     6→
     7→export const selectCartVisibility = createSelector([selectCart], (cart) => cart.visible)
     8→
     9→export const selectCartItems = createSelector([selectCart], (cart) => cart.items)
    10→
    11→export const selectCartItemsCount = createSelector([selectCartItems], (items) =>
    12→  items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.quantity, 0)
    13→)
    14→
    15→export const selectCartTotal = createSelector([selectCartItems], (items) =>
    16→  items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.quantity * item.price, 0)
    17→)

1→import { createSlice, CaseReducer, PayloadAction } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { CartItem } from '../cart'
     4→
     5→export type OrderState = {
     6→  items: CartItem[]
     7→}
     8→
     9→const saveOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState, PayloadAction<CartItem[]>> = (state, action) => {
    10→  state.items = action.payload
    11→}
    12→
    13→const clearOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState> = (state) => {
    14→  state.items = []
    15→}
    16→
    17→const initialState: OrderState = {
    18→  items: [],
    19→}
    20→
    21→const orderSlice = createSlice({
    22→  name: 'order',
    23→  initialState,
    24→  reducers: {
    25→    saveOrderAction: saveOrder,
    26→    clearOrderAction: clearOrder,
    27→  },
    28→})
    29→
    30→// Extract the action creators object and the reducer
    31→export const { actions, reducer } = orderSlice
    32→
    33→// Extract and export each action creator by name
    34→export const { saveOrderAction, clearOrderAction } = actions
    35→
    36→// Export the reducer, either as a default or named export
    37→export default reducer
    38→

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled, { css } from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→type FontSize = 'body' | 'bodyS' | 'bodyXS' | 'bodyXXS'
     5→type FontWeight = 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
     6→
     7→type StyledBodyProps = {
     8→  $size: string
     9→  $fontWeight: string
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BodyBase = styled.p<StyledBodyProps>(
    13→  ({ $size, $fontWeight, color: textColor, theme: { typography, color } }) => css`
    14→    display: block;
    15→    font-family: 'Hind';
    16→    color: ${textColor || color.primaryText};
    17→    font-weight: ${typography.fontWeight[$fontWeight as FontWeight]};
    18→    font-size: ${typography.fontSize[`body${$size}` as FontSize]};
    19→  `
    20→)
    21→
    22→type AsElement = 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    23→
    24→type ElementProps<T extends AsElement> = T extends 'label'
    25→  ? React.LabelHTMLAttributes<HTMLLabelElement>
    26→  : T extends 'span'
    27→    ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>
    28→    : T extends 'p'
    29→      ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
    30→      : React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
    31→
    32→type DefaultProps = {
    33→  className?: string
    34→  size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    35→  fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    36→  type?: AsElement
    37→  color?: string
    38→  children: React.ReactNode | string
    39→}
    40→
    41→type BodyProps = DefaultProps & ElementProps<AsElement>
    42→
    43→export const Body: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<BodyProps>> = ({
    44→  size = '',
    45→  fontWeight = 'regular',
    46→  type = 'p',
    47→  color,
    48→  children,
    49→  className,
    50→  ...props
    51→}) => (
    52→  <BodyBase
    53→    as={type}
    54→    $size={size}
    55→    $fontWeight={fontWeight}
    56→    color={color}
    57→    className={className}
    58→    {...props}
    59→  >
    60→    {children}
    61→  </BodyBase>
    62→)
    63→

1→import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
     2→import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
     3→import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'
     5→
     6→import { store } from './app-state'
     7→import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
     8→import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
     9→import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'
    10→
    11→export default function App() {
    12→  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
    13→  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <Router>
    17→      <StoreProvider store={store}>
    18→        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
    19→          <GlobalStyle />
    20→          <AppRoutes />
    21→        </ThemeProvider>
    22→      </StoreProvider>
    23→    </Router>
    24→  )
    25→}

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}

    42→

    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')

    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)

    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
